commands.review_summary:
The PR gates config recovery dedup health-state writes on successful backup restores and adds async/sync regression tests for retrying after failed copyFile restores.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main records lastObservedSuspiciousSignature after failed restore attempts, and resolveConfigReadRecoveryContext skips future attempts for the same signature. I did not run Vitest because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor proof is still insufficient, and maintainers should decide whether already-written failed-restore signatures require separate cleanup before merge.

target.title: fix(config): do not suppress recovery retry after failed backup restore
